entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop Arachis hypogaea L. studied for genetic diversity and disease resistance.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic characteristics within the peanut population.

entities.name: AMPHIDIPLOIDS
entities.description: Newly synthesized tetraploids created to broaden the genetic base of peanut.

entities.name: AUTOTETRAPLOIDS
entities.description: Newly synthesized tetraploids created to broaden the genetic base of peanut.

entities.name: SYNTHESIZED TETRAPLOIDS
entities.description: Amphidiploids and autotetraploids created to increase genetic diversity in peanut.

entities.name: MOLECULAR ANALYSIS
entities.description: Technique used to evaluate the genetic base and divergence of synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The biochemical makeup of the synthesized tetraploids, including oil and protein.

entities.name: OIL
entities.description: A component of the nutritional composition studied in synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: FATTY ACID COMPOSITION
entities.description: A component of the nutritional composition studied in synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: O/L RATIO
entities.description: The oil-to-lean ratio studied as part of nutritional composition.

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A component of the nutritional composition studied in synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: IODINE VALUE
entities.description: A measure of unsaturation in fats studied as part of nutritional composition.

entities.name: PROTEINASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Plant proteins that inhibit proteinase enzymes, found in synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: TRYPSIN INHIBITORS
entities.description: A specific type of proteinase inhibitor studied in synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: CHYMOTRYPSIN INHIBITORS
entities.description: A specific type of proteinase inhibitor studied in synthesized tetraploids.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease to which some synthesized tetraploid lines showed resistance.

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease to which some synthesized tetraploid lines showed resistance.
